description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named conda_build that runs on push to tags v* and branch master, and on pull requests to master. The workflow should have concurrent builds with cancel-in-progress set to true. It should set up an environment with various variables and then run two jobs: one for testing with Conda libsecp256k1 on ubuntu-latest with Python 3.12, and another for building Linux wheels that depends on the test job.
